reachable_chest_count: Starting from the player, how many treasure chests can be reached by walking only through open floor and corridors?
Count the treasure chests reachable from the player without crossing boulders. What is the count?
From the player's position, how many chests are connected by unblocked floor paths?
Follow paths through the open dungeon floor from the player. How many treasure chests can be reached?
How many treasure chests can the player reach without passing through a corridor blocked by a boulder?
monster_chamber_count: How many treasure chambers contain a monster?
Count the treasure chambers that have a monster inside. What is the count?
How many chamber areas with treasure chests also contain a monster?
Looking across the treasure chambers, how many contain a visible monster?
What is the number of treasure chambers that include a monster?
safe_reachable_chest_count: Starting from the player, how many treasure chests can be reached without crossing boulders, excluding any chest in a chamber that contains a monster?
Count the treasure chests reachable from the player without crossing boulders, but do not count chests in monster chambers. What is the count?
From the player's position, how many reachable treasure chests are in chambers without monsters?
Follow only unblocked dungeon paths from the player. How many reachable chests are not inside monster chambers?
How many treasure chests can the player reach without passing through boulder-blocked paths, after excluding chests in chambers with monsters?
missing_patch_label: Which lettered patch option restores the missing region in the dungeon image?
Choose the letter of the patch that fits the blank region in the top dungeon panel.
Which option matches the removed part of the dungeon scene?
Select the lettered patch that completes the missing area of the dungeon map.
What is the letter of the patch option that belongs in the blank region?
